title: Introducing Lyria 3 Pro
summary: Google DeepMind introduced Lyria 3 Pro, an advanced music generation model enabling creation of custom tracks up to 3 minutes long with enhanced customization and creative control. The tool expands deployment across more Google products following the initial Lyria 3 release.
